title: AbilityMania
description: Ability Mania is a server-functional plug-in that adds super powers.
body:
# Abilities Plugin ⚡

Unlock **8 powerful superpowers** and dominate your Minecraft server!

## What is this?

Abilities gives players incredible powers activated with a simple key press. Each ability has unique mechanics - some even have hidden secondary functions waiting to be discovered.

## Available Powers

Choose from **8 distinct abilities**:
- **Lightning Strike** - Call down thunder on your enemies
- **Telekinesis** - Control entities with your mind
- **Tamer** - Turn hostile mobs into loyal companions
- **Pyromancer** - Master the flames
- **Cryomancer** - Freeze your foes
- **Windwalker** - Speed and mobility
- **Necromancer** - Command the undead
- **Healer** - Support yourself and allies

## How to Use

1. Type `/ab <ability>` to select a power (e.g. `/ab lightning`)
2. Look at your target
3. Press **F** to activate
4. Try **Sneak + F** on different abilities to discover secret moves!
5. Switch abilities anytime with `/ab <different_ability>`
6. Turn off with `/ab off`

**Tab completion** makes browsing abilities easy - just type `/ab` and press Tab!

## Commands

- `/ability` or `/ab` - Show all available abilities
- `/ab <name>` - Select an ability  
- `/ab off` - Disable current ability

## Perfect For

- PvP servers looking for unique combat mechanics
- Roleplay servers with different character classes
- Survival servers that want extra powers
- Anyone who wants to feel epic!

## Technical Details

- **Minecraft Version:** 1.21.1+
- **Server Software:** Paper, Spigot, Bukkit
- **Performance:** Optimized and lightweight
- **No Dependencies:** Works standalone

---

Experiment, discover, and find your favorite power! 🔥
